title: Flat Key Signatures
description: Learn the order of flats and how to identify major keys from F to Db.

sessions.title: BEAD Greatest Common Factor
sessions.description: Learn the exact order that flats appear in a key signature.
sessions.prompt: Teach the order of flats: B, E, A, D, G, C, F. Notice how it is the reverse of the sequence of sharps. Provide interactive exercises testing the sequence.

sessions.title: The Second-to-Last Trick
sessions.description: Learn the shortcut to identify any flat major key.
sessions.prompt: Teach the fast rule for finding a Flat Major key: The second-to-last flat IS the name of the key (except for F major with one flat, which must be memorized). Provide an exercise presenting various flat key signatures and asking the user to play the correct tonic.

levels.criteria: Can instantly name a major key by looking at its flat signature.
